expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add persistent notification center with unread management and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification read-state persistence",
      "description": "As a product team, I want notification read state stored persistently so that read and unread status survives across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add persistent storage for notification read state per user and notification",
        "Existing notifications default to unread until explicitly marked otherwise",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add-notification-read-state.sql",
        "src/db/schema/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Expose notification read-state types",
      "description": "As a developer, I want notification models to include read state so that backend and UI code share one contract.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared notification types expose whether a notification is read",
        "Notification list payloads include the fields needed for unread badges and filtering",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/types/notification.ts",
        "src/models/notification.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend mark notification read or unread action",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what still needs attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide a server action, endpoint, or service to toggle a notification between read and unread",
        "Changes persist across sessions for the same user",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/updateReadState.ts",
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add backend notification list read-state filter",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification queries filtered by read state so that the notification center can show unread or read subsets.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list query accepts all, unread, and read filter states",
        "Returned notifications match the selected read-state filter",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/listNotifications.ts",
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add backend clear all read notifications action",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear read notifications so that my notification center stays focused on active items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide an action that removes or archives all read notifications for the current user",
        "Unread notifications remain untouched after clearing read items",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/clearReadNotifications.ts",
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Show unread badge in app chrome",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge so that I can see at a glance whether new notifications need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Navigation or header displays an unread notification badge count when unread items exist",
        "Badge count updates after read-state changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/navigation/NotificationBadge.tsx",
        "src/components/layout/AppHeader.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add notification center list surface",
      "description": "As a user, I want a notification center list so that I can review recent notifications in one place.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can open a notification list or panel from the application chrome",
        "The list renders notification items with read-state styling",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx",
        "src/components/layout/AppHeader.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Add read and unread controls to notification items",
      "description": "As a user, I want controls on each notification item so that I can mark it read or unread from the list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each notification item includes a control to mark it read or unread",
        "Changing the control updates item styling and unread counts using the read-state action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationItem.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-009",
      "title": "Add notification center read-state filter UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or previously handled items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center exposes filter options for all, unread, and read",
        "Changing the filter refreshes the list using the backend read-state filter",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationFilters.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 9,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-010",
      "title": "Add clear read notifications control",
      "description": "As a user, I want a clear read action in the notification center so that I can remove completed items in one step.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center includes a clear read action",
        "Activating the action removes or archives only read notifications and refreshes the list and badge count",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/ClearReadButton.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 10,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
